summary: Iteration 2 re-test of Memory Link couples photo-sharing app. All critical bug fixes from iteration 1 are verified working end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest cases pass. Photo upload to object storage succeeds (200 OK), partner lookup returns correct partner, auto-notification created on partner photo upload, mark-read updates unread count, photo download enforces 403 for non-couple users. Frontend Playwright E2E: full two-user flow works — Alice creates pair code -> Bob joins -> Alice uploads photo with caption -> photo visible to both in gallery -> Bob receives notification -> reaction succeeds -> mark-as-read works -> bottom nav navigates across Camera/Gallery/Notifications. Service worker registers and VAPID public key endpoint returns valid key.

minor.issue: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is read on every put_object via init_storage() lazy load. Fine functionally, but consider caching the client instance once initialised to avoid re-init overhead on every upload.
List endpoint filters only by userId (no coupleId scoping). If a user changes couple in future, they would still see stale notifications. Not a blocker today since coupleId is immutable per user.

issues: Photo card image area renders a yellow placeholder block instead of the actual photo until the image loads from /photos/{id}/download — consider showing a skeleton/loader for clearer UX.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 425 lines with all routes (auth/photos/notifications/push/reminders) in one file. Recommend splitting into routers (routers/auth.py, routers/photos.py, etc.) when file grows further.
PushService instantiated per-request inside upload_photo. Acceptable, but consider reusing the app.state-stored instance or the push_service_factory used by the scheduler for consistency.
Notification list endpoint does not paginate (length=100 cap). For long-term users this will silently truncate; add pagination or lastN param.
react_to_photo allows unlimited duplicate reactions from same user with the same emoji (no $addToSet). Each click pushes a new reaction entry. Consider de-duping by (userId, emoji).
test_credentials: No auth required. Test users created on the fly. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and VAPID keys configured in /app/backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_* prefixed users (Alice, Bob, solo, codegen, C1, C2, C3) directly via API. Not cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes from iteration 1 are verified. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_memory_link.py covers root, auth (create-user, me, generate-code, join-couple, partner), photos (upload, list, react), notifications (list, unread-count), push (vapid-public-key), reminders (create, list). Frontend Playwright E2E covers full two-user pairing+photo+notification flow. If retesting, simply rerun: `cd /app && pytest backend/tests/test_memory_link.py -v`. Note: gallery photo card image renders a yellow placeholder while loading — this is the bg color of the card container, not a bug, but a design polish opportunity.
rca of the issue: N/A — all issues from iteration 1 (couple ObjectId vs UUID mismatch, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY captured at import time before load_dotenv, notification UUID lookup) have been correctly fixed and re-verified.
